content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed the milestone CLI handler changes across src/cli/milestone.rs and tests/cli.rs. The diff introduces: (1) a validate_workspace helper DRY-ing workspace version checks across all 4 handlers, (2) post-draft_milestone status inspection with correct AwaitingAnswers early-return, (3) removal of snapshot fallback for bead count when plan.json is missing, (4) direct plan bundle loading in load_milestone_detail for accurate has_plan, and (5) comprehensive new tests covering no-plan-fallback, workspace version rejection, and the AwaitingAnswers flow. All checks pass: cargo test (792 pass), cargo clippy -- -D warnings, cargo fmt --check, and nix build. Types and trait methods verified correct (RequirementsStatus has Display, RequirementsRun has status + status_summary fields, draft_milestone returns String run_id). The behavioral change from snapshot-fallback to 0-when-no-plan is intentional, tested, and safe because format_progress_line already uses bead_count.max(progress.total_beads). No bugs, safety issues, or significant correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
